## What changed

Describe the user-visible or engineering outcome and why this approach is maintainable.

## Verification

List the focused checks you ran. Name commands and check suites rather than a
hand-counted total that will become stale.

## Security or data impact

- Does this change authorization, encryption, stored data, credentials, or release
  behavior? If so, describe the impact and relevant test or documentation update.

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR title is a concrete, Conventional Commit title.
- [ ] The change is cohesive and removes superseded code, tests, or documentation.
